role_classes.title: Root Operator
role_classes.summary: Holder of the root signing key with authority over all trust anchors and canonical documents

role_classes.title: Policy Approver
role_classes.summary: Authorized to approve changes to governance policies and registry contents

role_classes.title: Registry Maintainer
role_classes.summary: Authorized to maintain and update registry contents within approved policy bounds

role_classes.title: Issuer Operator
role_classes.summary: Operator of an issuer node authorized to issue and manage credentials within assigned lanes

role_classes.title: Attestor (Reserved)
role_classes.summary: Reserved role class for future independent attestation services

role_classes.title: Witness (Reserved)
role_classes.summary: Reserved role class for future independent witness services

authority_scopes.title: Policy Signing
authority_scopes.summary: Authority to sign governance policy documents

authority_scopes.title: Registry Signing
authority_scopes.summary: Authority to sign registry documents including vocabulary, basis, and profile registries

authority_scopes.title: Status Projection (Reserved)
authority_scopes.summary: Reserved scope for future status projection authority

authority_scopes.title: Clause Registry (Reserved)
authority_scopes.summary: Reserved scope for future clause registry management authority

authority_scopes.title: Attestor Registry (Reserved)
authority_scopes.summary: Reserved scope for future attestor registry management authority

authority_scopes.title: Clearing Statement (Reserved)
authority_scopes.summary: Reserved scope for future clearing statement signing authority

approval_classes.title: Single Controlled
approval_classes.summary: Approval requires authorization from a single authorized party

approval_classes.title: Dual Control
approval_classes.summary: Approval requires independent authorization from two or more authorized parties

decision_basis_classes.title: Canon Reference
decision_basis_classes.summary: Decision based on the canonical document registry

decision_basis_classes.title: Trust Store Reference
decision_basis_classes.summary: Decision based on the trust store containing authorized keys and document version prefixes

decision_basis_classes.title: Verification Basis Reference
decision_basis_classes.summary: Decision based on a registered verification basis entry

decision_basis_classes.title: Evidence Profile Reference
decision_basis_classes.summary: Decision based on a registered evidence profile entry

decision_basis_classes.title: Lane Registry Reference
decision_basis_classes.summary: Decision based on the lane registry for credential routing

decision_basis_classes.title: Billing Policy Reference
decision_basis_classes.summary: Decision based on the billing policy for fee and settlement terms

decision_basis_classes.title: Issuer Registry Reference
decision_basis_classes.summary: Decision based on the issuer registry for authorized issuer information

decision_basis_classes.title: Release Manifest Reference
decision_basis_classes.summary: Decision based on a release manifest for software artifact verification

decision_basis_classes.title: Settlement Proof Reference
decision_basis_classes.summary: Decision based on a settlement proof for financial reconciliation

receipt_classes.title: PXTL Signed Credential Token v1
receipt_classes.summary: Signed credential token issued as proof of credential lifecycle event

receipt_classes.title: Release Attestation v1
receipt_classes.summary: Attestation receipt for software release verification

receipt_classes.title: Settlement Debit Proof v1
receipt_classes.summary: Proof of debit entry in settlement processing

receipt_classes.title: Settlement Statement v1
receipt_classes.summary: Statement receipt for completed settlement cycle

receipt_classes.title: Attestor Receipt (Reserved)
receipt_classes.summary: Reserved receipt class for future attestor-issued receipts

receipt_classes.title: Witness Receipt (Reserved)
receipt_classes.summary: Reserved receipt class for future witness-issued receipts

attestor_classes.title: Independent Build Attestor (Reserved)
attestor_classes.summary: Reserved class for future independent build attestation services

attestor_classes.title: Independent Evidence Attestor (Reserved)
attestor_classes.summary: Reserved class for future independent evidence attestation services

independence_classes.title: Same Operator
independence_classes.summary: Operation performed by the same entity that originated the request

independence_classes.title: Separate Controlled
independence_classes.summary: Operation performed by a separately controlled entity within the same organization

independence_classes.title: Independent Third Party (Reserved)
independence_classes.summary: Reserved class for future independent third-party verification services

witness_classes.title: Co-sign Witness (Reserved)
witness_classes.summary: Reserved class for future co-signing witness services

revocation_reason_codes.title: Key Compromise
revocation_reason_codes.summary: Revocation due to confirmed or suspected compromise of a signing key

revocation_reason_codes.title: Policy Superseded
revocation_reason_codes.summary: Revocation because the governing policy has been replaced by a newer version

revocation_reason_codes.title: Trust Withdrawn
revocation_reason_codes.summary: Revocation due to explicit withdrawal of trust by the governing authority

revocation_reason_codes.title: Operational Suspension
revocation_reason_codes.summary: Temporary revocation due to operational requirements or incident response

status_reason_codes.title: Active
status_reason_codes.summary: Entity or credential is currently active and valid for use

status_reason_codes.title: Suspended
status_reason_codes.summary: Entity or credential is temporarily suspended pending review or resolution

status_reason_codes.title: Revoked
status_reason_codes.summary: Entity or credential has been permanently revoked and must not be accepted

status_reason_codes.title: Reserved Not Enabled
status_reason_codes.summary: Capability is reserved in the governance vocabulary but not yet enabled for operational use

assurance_classes.title: Internal Control
assurance_classes.summary: Assurance provided through internal organizational controls and processes

assurance_classes.title: External Submission
assurance_classes.summary: Assurance based on externally submitted evidence subject to automated validation

assurance_classes.title: High Assurance
assurance_classes.summary: Assurance requiring multiple independent verification steps and elevated controls

assurance_classes.title: Clearing Network
assurance_classes.summary: Assurance provided through participation in a clearing network with multilateral controls

settlement_method_classes.title: Prepaid Ledger Only
settlement_method_classes.summary: Settlement method using prepaid balance deductions from an issuer ledger

clearing_cycle_classes.title: Monthly UTC
clearing_cycle_classes.summary: Clearing cycle operating on calendar month boundaries in UTC timezone
